title: Kubernetes-DevOps Certification Interview
prompt: Conduct enterprise-level Kubernetes-DevOps certification interview. Focus on production scenarios, troubleshooting methodology, and architectural decisions.
behavioral_questions: Tell me about production incident you resolved under pressure
